verificationMessageSent.help: A verification email has been sent to your address. You can safely close this page.
verificationMessageSent.title: Email sent

experience.help: Choose which section will appear after you sign in.
experience.note: This choice only determines your default page after signing in. You will still be able to access both areas and change this preference from your profile.

Gamemaster.help: Go directly to the Gamemaster portal and your list of worlds after signing in.
Gamemaster.label: Gamemaster

Player.help: Go directly to your character sheets after signing in.
Player.label: Player

personal.help: Enter your first and last name to personalize your profile.

preferences.help: Add a few optional details, then confirm your language and time zone.

security.help: Choose how you want to sign in and protect your account.

multiFactor.help: Sign in with your password, then enter the verification code received by email.
multiFactor.label: Password with two-factor verification
multiFactor.note: One-time link sign-in will not be available.

password.help: Sign in with your password or request a sign-in link by email.
password.label: Password or email link

passwordLess.help: Receive a one-time sign-in link by email.
passwordLess.label: Email link

signIn.help: Enter your email address to sign in or create an account.
signIn.title: Sign In
